description: Case style: Analogue watch, steel toned, circular case, has stainless steel backDial style: Black, textured dial with steel toned accents and screw detail, has white and black markings, steel toned hour and minute hands with white inlay, steel toned seconds hand, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Screw to reset time, three face chronograph display, year and month display below the 12 hour markStrap style: Steel and silver toned, bracelet style strap, has a butterfly claspWater resistant up to 100 metresComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
